zh.lifeSummary: 當William Burgess於1348年出生在英國素福爾可時，他的父親Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh61歲，母親Countess Elizabeth de Verdun43歲。他於1374年與Lady Mary Curtis在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉可費爾德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1400年在英國英格蘭享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Burgess于1348年出生在英国素福爾可时，他的父亲Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh61岁，母亲Countess Elizabeth de Verdun43岁。他于1374年与Lady Mary Curtis在英国英格兰素福爾可拉可費爾德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1400年在英国英格兰享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Burgess
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: status name from Middle English burge(i)s, burgis, borgeis ‘inhabitant of a borough’ (strictly one possessing full municipal rights), ‘freeman of a borough’. Burgesses generally had tenure of land or buildings from a landlord by burgage. In medieval England burgage involved the payment of a fixed money rent (as opposed to payment in kind); in Scotland it involved payment in service, guarding the town. The -eis ending is from Latin -ensis (modern English -ese as in Portuguese). Compare Burger .
History: Thomas Burgess came from England to MA c. 1630 and eventually settled in Sandwich, MA.

variants.name: Burger
meanings: German (also Bürger), Dutch, and English: status name for a freeman of a borough, especially one who was a member of its governing council. The term is a derivative of Middle High German burc, Middle Dutch burch, Middle English burg ‘(fortified) town’. The surname of German origin is also found in some other parts of Europe, e.g. in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Poland, Czechia, Slovenia, and Croatia (see also 3 below). It also occurs as a Jewish (Ashkenazic) surname, but the reasons for its adoption are uncertain. The English name is found occasionally as a surname from the 13th century onward, but is not recorded as a vocabulary word until the 16th century. The usual English term was the Old French word burgeis ‘burgess’ (see Burgess ). This surname is also established in South Africa. Compare Buerger .
German: habitational name for someone from any of the many places called Burg.
Germanized or Americanized form of Slovenian Burgar, a status name of the same the same (Middle High) German origin as 1 above.

variants.name: Burges
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Burgess  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Burgess was born in 1348, in Suffolk, England, his father, Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, was 61 and his mother, Countess Elizabeth de Verdun, was 43. He married Lady Mary Curtis in 1374, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1400, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Burgess est né en 1348, à Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, avait 61 ans et sa mère, Countess Elizabeth de Verdun, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Lady Mary Curtis en 1374, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1400, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Burgess 1348 in Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh 61 und seine Mutter Countess Elizabeth de Verdun 43. Er hat 1374 in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Lady Mary Curtis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1400 im Alter von 52 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Burgess è nato il nel 1348 nel Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, aveva 61 anni e il suo madre, Countess Elizabeth de Verdun, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Lady Mary Curtis nel 1374, nel Laxfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1400, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Burgessが1348年にイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghershは61歳，母Countess Elizabeth de Verdunは43歳であった。1374年にイギリスイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドでLady Mary Curtisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1400年にイギリスイギリスで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Burgess(이)가 1348년 영국 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh(은)는 61세였고, 그의 어머니 Countess Elizabeth de Verdun(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1374년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 라스필드에서 Lady Mary Curtis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1400년 영국 잉글랜드에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Burgess nasceu em 1348, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, tinha 61 anos e sua mãe, Countess Elizabeth de Verdun, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Mary Curtis em 1374, em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1400, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Burgess родился в 1348 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh было 61 год, а матери, которую звали Countess Elizabeth de Verdun, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Mary Curtis в 1374 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1400 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Burgess nació en 1348, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, tenía 61 años y su mamá, Countess Elizabeth de Verdun, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Lady Mary Curtis en 1374, en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1400, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años.
